{{Infobox location
| name = Consultant dungeon
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultant dungeon]] is located next door to where [[Lucan]] and [[Jerri]] were cellmates.}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
